task_completion.description: Draw the 2D cross-section of the dovetail guide rail
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 2D sketch of a dovetail profile (a rectangular base with a trapezoidal dovetail shape on top) is visible in the SolveSpace canvas.

task_completion.description: Constrain the base width and height
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dimension labels of '50' (or 50.0) for the base width and '10' (or 10.0) for the base height are visible on the sketch.

task_completion.description: Constrain the dovetail top width and total height
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dimension labels of '30' (or 30.0) for the dovetail top width and '25' (or 25.0) for the total height are visible on the sketch.

task_completion.description: Center the dovetail horizontally and fully constrain the sketch
task_completion.visual_evidence: Constraints (such as symmetry, equal length, or specific distance dimensions) are visible to center the dovetail on the base. The property browser should indicate the sketch is fully constrained (e.g., '0 d.o.f.' or 'ok').

task_completion.description: Extrude the 2D profile to an 80mm depth
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2D sketch is extruded into a 3D solid object. The property browser shows an extrusion depth parameter set to '80' or '80.0'.

task_completion.description: Save the file to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the directory '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/' and filename 'dovetail_rail.slvs', or the SolveSpace window title bar displays 'dovetail_rail.slvs'.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to create the model
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SolveSpace application interface being actively used with tools, sketches, and property browsers visible, rather than terminal commands generating the file.

integrity.description: The 3D model is genuinely rendered in the software
integrity.visual_evidence: The canvas displays a proper 3D rendering of the dovetail rail with SolveSpace's typical shading, edges, and coordinate axes, not an imported image.

integrity.description: The agent started from a blank canvas
integrity.visual_evidence: Early screenshots show an empty workspace or a new sketch being started, proving the agent did not simply open a pre-made file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/dovetail_rail.slvs. The model must have exactly 8 lines in its 2D profile. The required dimensions are: base width 50.0mm, base height 10.0mm, top width 30.0mm, total height 25.0mm, dovetail height 15.0mm, and extrusion depth 80.0mm.
